author: forever-utf8
description: VS Code-style preview tabs, file-state coloring, tag badges, and nav icons for your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yntangxi
manifest.description: VS Code-style preview tabs, file-state coloring, tag badges, and nav icons for your vault.
manifest.name: Act Like VSCode

name: Act Like VSCode

releases.author: forever-utf8
releases.description:
# What's New

## Features

 - Inline tag color sync — file names in the explorer and their inline tags now share the same configured color for consistent visual
identity.
 - Simplified navigation icons — replaced SVG icon sets with lightweight dynamic icons; folder icons react to collapsed/expanded state.
 - Bundled CSS snippet — a personal Notion-style snippet is included in snippets/. Copy to .obsidian/snippets/ and enable it in
Appearance settings.
 - Settings UI overhaul — cleaner configuration panel with reordered options.
